_meta.title: MRA world map (coordinate-driven, CSV-free)
_meta.provenance: Placement derived ENTIRELY from SEC filenames (binary-grounded: prefix->EW, Y-range->NS, Yend=Ystart+31, 32x32 playable). The community CSV is NOT used. place_name/status carried from the .ods 'Layout' sheet, which cross-checks 7/7 vs MAPS.TXT and 69/69 vs the on-disk SEC files.
binary_grounded_facts: SEC files 33x33x6=6534 bytes, effective 32x32 playable (SCB FUN_00405854).
Layer transitions via terrain bytes 0x04/0x05 (SCB FUN_00407a34).

coordinate_system.engine_vs_mp: Engine uses x_block/y_block indices + y_axis_ranges; MP-X/Y/Z are the human-readable community coordinates layered on top.
coordinate_system.prefix_cipher_is_cyclic: The .SEC prefix cipher is cyclic, period 8, order BECJ,CKDP,DQEV,EWGB,GCHH,HIIN,IOX,YBD. sector_map.xls tiles it across Sheets A/B/C, so a prefix is only locally unique; all extant files fall in one cycle (MP-X 45..80). A fully populated world would repeat each prefix every +40 MP-X.

status_legend.filled_not_in_game: .ods #99ccff: drawn for looks, not in game
status_legend.no_map: .ods #ff0000: no map available to the cartographer
status_legend.void: behind the Veil of Darkness / not open (.ods black, or text Void/???)
